idea-plugin.name: Yii2 Model Magic
idea-plugin.description:
Yii2 Model Magic

PhpStorm plugin with full support for Yii2 model magic properties via __get()/__set().

Features:

  • Code Completion — Smart autocomplete for magic properties from getters, setters, relations, fields, and PHPDoc
  • Go To Declaration — Navigate directly to getter/setter method (not just PHPDoc)
  • Type Inference — Accurate type hints for magic properties
  • Code Inspections — Detect unknown properties with quick fixes
  • Reference Resolution — Find usages and rename refactoring work correctly

Property Priority:

  1. Relations (hasOne/hasMany) — highest priority
  2. Getter methods (getXxx())
  3. Setter methods (setXxx())
  4. Database columns from attributes()
  5. Public fields
  6. PHPDoc @property annotations — fallback

Supported:

  • yii\db\ActiveRecord
  • yii\base\Model
  • Traits and behaviors
  • ArrayAccess syntax: $model['property']
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release with full magic property support
  • Code completion with icons and priority sorting
  • Smart navigation to getters/setters
  • Type inference for all property kinds
  • Inspections with quick fixes
  • ArrayAccess support ($model['property'])
  • Trait and behavior support
